title: Support request: TS0004 – _TZ3000_enmfaave (4‑gang switch)
excerpt:
Hello,
I would like to request support for this Tuya Zigbee 4‑gang switch:

ModelId: TS0004

ManufacturerName: _TZ3000_enmfaave

Type: 4‑gang relay switch

Added as: Unknown Zigbee Device in Homey Pro 2023
